candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Concatenated header-like line that includes current assets wording, but values correspond to non-current assets and not ACT.
Balancing/check line, not the reported total current assets.
Non-current balancing line, unrelated to ACT.
Cash flow item, not a balance sheet current assets total.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported balance sheet total for current assets.

candidates.why: Exact balance sheet cash line; preferred for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of the period
candidates.why: Cash flow ending cash agrees conceptually, but CHE should come from balance sheet when available.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of the period
candidates.why: Beginning cash, not period-end balance sheet cash.

candidates.row_label: Exchange rate differential cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: FX adjustment, not cash balance.
Non-cash adjustment, unrelated to cash balance.

variables.notes: Used the exact balance sheet cash line.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Component of current liabilities, not the total.
Debt component within current liabilities, not the total.
Balancing/check line, not the reported total.
Non-current, not current liabilities.
Non-current component, not LCT.
Balancing/check line, not LCT.
Cash flow change item, not balance sheet stock.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported total current liabilities.

candidates.why: Clean current interest-bearing debt line on the balance sheet; preferred short-term debt measure and excludes leases.
Current portion of long-term debt; relevant fallback/older-period line for STD when current borrowings line may be incomplete or absent.
Can represent short-term financing, but values are blank and not needed when cleaner debt lines exist.
Cash flow movement, not balance sheet debt stock.

variables.notes: Included the minimal financing-related current debt components while excluding lease liabilities. 'Current liabilities to credit institutions' captures current borrowings; 'Debt - Long-Term - Maturities - within 1 Year' captures current maturities of long-term debt. These appear complementary rather than duplicative in this statement.

candidates.why: Exact match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

variables.notes: Exact balance sheet tax payable line.

candidates.why: Best available total/net PPE-type line on the balance sheet under IFRS; preferred over gross component rows.
Only a gross component of PPE, not total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Other - Accumulated Depreciation & Impairment
candidates.why: Contra-asset component, not PPE total.
Balancing/value line with poor availability; less clean than 'Tangible assets'.
Capex flow, not PPE stock.
Intangible, not PPE.
Intangible, not PPE.

candidates.row_label: Intangible Assets - Other - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Intangible contra line, not PPE.
Intangible total, not PPE.
Intangible balancing line, not PPE.
Cash flow item and intangible, not PPE stock.

variables.notes: Used the reported tangible assets line as the best available total/net PPE measure.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.

variables.notes: Exact balance sheet total assets line.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities Cash flow from investing activities
candidates.why: Despite concatenated wording, values and placement indicate the net cash flow from operating activities total.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before changes in working capital Changes in working capital
candidates.why: This is operating cash flow before working capital changes, not the final net cash from operating activities.

final_choice.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities Cash flow from investing activities

variables.notes: Selected the cash flow statement line representing net cash from operating activities; the label is concatenated with the next section header but the values correspond to operating cash flow.
